channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Supreme Court Upholds Biden Regulation on "Ghost Guns"
item.description: The Supreme Court has upheld a Biden administration regulation on ghost guns, clearing the way for continued serial numbers, background checks and age verification requirements for buying kits online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Pro-Ject’s new vinyl flattener will fix any warped LPs you inadvertently buy on Record Store Day
item.description: Pro-Ject is answering your warped vinyl prayers ahead of Record Store Day 2025 –say hello to Flatten it.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Rivian spins out startup focused on ‘micromobility’ EVs
item.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. is spinning out a business that will develop small electric vehicles designed for short trips.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Samsung announces US prices for its 2025 mini-LED TV lineup, and it’s good and bad news
item.description: Samsung has announced US pricing for its new 4K and 8K mini-LED TVs, and prices for the flagship 8K series are largely higher than in 20204.
item.dc:creator: al.griffin@futurenet.com (Al Griffin), TechRadar

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Marvel has revealed the full, 27-strong cast for Avengers: Doomsday, and there are plenty of heroes who seemingly won't be part of its roster
item.description: Marvel has revealed who'll be part of Avengers 5's cast - and there are some big hitters missing from its roster.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Critical RCE flaws put Kubernetes clusters at risk of takeover
item.description: The Kubernetes project has released patches for five vulnerabilities in a widely used popular component called the Ingress NGINX Controller that’s used to route external traffic to Kubernetes services. If exploited, the flaw could allow attackers to completely take over entire clusters.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Ethernet roadmap: AI drives high-speed, efficient Ethernet networks
item.description: At next month’s Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC), many of the technologies that are driving current and future Ethernet development will be on full display by the Ethernet Alliance, which is set to unveil its tenth anniversary Ethernet roadmap.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Elon Musk’s broadband satellites have long-term costs, states say
item.description: One state official shared internal data that showed satellite service costs consumers 53% more over the course of 30 years.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Google Maps is getting two key upgrades, for easier route planning and quicker access to Gemini AI
item.description: Google Maps on Android can now bring up route information more quickly, and adds its own Gemini shortcut.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 3 steps to get your data AI ready
item.description: While many organizations have already run a small number of successful proofs of concept to demonstrate the value of gen AI, scaling up those PoCs and applying the new technology to other parts of the business will never work until producing AI-ready data becomes standard practice.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Open-source Styrolite project aims to simplify container runtime security
item.description: Today Edera launched a new open-source project called Styrolite to bring tighter controls to the interactions between containers and Linux kernel namespaces, at a layer below where Open Container Initiative (OCI) runtimes like containerd operate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Intro to Alpine.js: A JavaScript framework for minimalists
item.description: I recently backpacked through Big Sur, and after a few days, the inevitable happened: I looked at everything I carried and demanded it justify its presence in my backpack. Making tech choices during the software development process is similar.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cómo hacer frente al cambio cultural de las metodologías ágiles
item.description: Un escaso cuarto de siglo ha pasado desde que un grupo de 17 programadores se reuniese en Utah para debatir sobre viejos y nuevos métodos de desarrollo de software.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Researchers in limbo as Columbia bows to Trump’s demands in bid to restore $400M federal funding
item.description: Researchers at Columbia University remain in limbo after the Ivy League institution bowed to the Trump administration’s demands for unprecedented changes in a bid to restore some $400 million in federal funds cut.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OpenAI brings AI image generation directly to ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI is introducing image generation directly within ChatGPT. Powered by its flagship multimodal model, GPT-4o, the chatbot can now create visuals straight from the chat interface. The feature will initially be available to ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Team, and free users.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Oracle releases ML-optimized GraalVM for JDK 24
item.description: Oracle has released GraalVM for JDK 24, an alternative Java Development Kit tuned to just-released JDK 24 that uses ML (machine learning)-based profile inference to boost peak performance by about 7.9% on average on microservices benchmarks, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Senate confirms Michael Kratsios to lead White House science, tech office
item.description: The Senate confirmed Michael Kratsios to head the White House’s Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) with bipartisan support. Kratsios, who was Trump’s chief technology officer during his first White House term, was approved Tuesday by the upper chamber in a 74-25 vote.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: GenAI tools for R: New tools to make R programming easier
item.description: My previous article focused on some of the best tools for incorporating LLMs into your R scripts and workflows. We’ll expand on that theme here, offering up a collection of generative AI tools you can use to get help with your R programming or to run LLMs locally with R.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenTofu becomes the real deal
item.description: In open source, forks often struggle to break free from the shadow of their progenitors. But OpenTofu, the community-driven Terraform fork born from HashiCorp’s licensing upheaval, is writing a different story.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Draft EO would make GSA the center of most common buys
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to sign two executive orders in the coming weeks that seek to reform federal acquisition, including a rewrite of the FAR. The post Draft EO would make GSA the center of most common buys first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NHL launches a front office iPad app to modernize roster, contract and salary cap info for teams
item.description: MANALAPAN, Fla. (AP) — The NHL has launched a front office app that modernizes the league’s roster, contract and salary cap information.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: SoftBank to buy Ampere for $6.5B, fueling Arm-based server market competition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire Ampere Computing for $6.5 billion, significantly expanding its footprint in the rapidly evolving Arm-based server processor market.
item.dc:creator: Network World
